# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deployment Workflow
on:
  push:
    branches: [ master ] # adjust as needed

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
        
      - name: Run custom build scripts
        run: |
          chmod +x ./scripts/* # change './path_to_script' to your script path, make sure the file has executable permissions.
          ./scripts/* # change './path_to_script' to your script path 
          
      - name: Run deployment commands
        run: |
          YOUR_DEPLOYMENT_COMMANDS_HERE # replace this with your actual deployment commands
